root_cause: Fly ash erosion on tube bend due to high gas velocity
corrective_action: Emergency tube plugging; replaced 2 eroded tubes during next planned shutdown
preventive_action: Install erosion shields on economizer tube bends; adjust gas velocity by modifying baffle

root_cause: Lubrication starvation — grease pump malfunction went undetected
corrective_action: Replaced bearing set; repaired grease pump; added vibration monitoring alarm
preventive_action: Install continuous vibration monitoring with auto-alarm at 4.5 mm/s; weekly grease pump function check

root_cause: Moisture ingress through cracked insulator bushing
corrective_action: Replaced cracked insulator bushing; cleaned and dried all bushings
preventive_action: Quarterly insulator inspection added to PM schedule; install moisture sensors in TR room

root_cause: Fouling on process-side tubes — coking deposits reducing heat transfer
corrective_action: Scheduled mechanical cleaning during next turnaround
preventive_action: Add online chemical cleaning system; install tube skin temperature monitoring

corrective_action: Laser alignment of coupling; shimmed foundation bolts; replaced damaged coupling element
preventive_action: Annual laser alignment check; foundation settlement monitoring every 6 months

root_cause: Seal face damage due to thermal shock — pump started with cold TF in hot system
corrective_action: Replaced mechanical seal; installed slow-start interlock for pump when TF temp >100°C
preventive_action: Add TF temperature interlock to prevent pump start when delta-T >50°C between pump and system

root_cause: Fatigue failure of chain link — exceeded recommended replacement interval by 4 months
corrective_action: Replaced chain and sprockets; realigned conveyor drive
preventive_action: Strict adherence to OEM replacement intervals; add chain elongation measurement to monthly PM

root_cause: NPSH insufficient due to deaerator level control malfunction
corrective_action: Replaced impeller and wear rings; repaired deaerator level control valve
preventive_action: Install NPSH monitoring with alarm; add redundant level transmitter on deaerator

root_cause: Foreign object (metal piece) fell from hopper onto belt
corrective_action: Spliced belt; installed magnetic separator above conveyor feed point
preventive_action: Add magnetic separator and metal detector before all ash conveyor feed points

root_cause: Air filter clogged — differential pressure exceeded limit; motor drew excess current
corrective_action: Cleaned air filter; reset motor overload relay
preventive_action: Change filter replacement frequency from quarterly to monthly during dusty season
